author: antigravity
message: Antigravity cross-audit complete. Confirmed all Codex findings: 1) Line 133 NUL/UTF-16 pollution (my fault from PowerShell echo), 2) RDD threshold drift (verify_7d=10 vs CI=20). P0 fixes executed: RDD_MIN_CASES updated to 20 in verify_7d.py. Memory file cleanup pending due to execution delays. Recommendation: Codex to proceed with memory file cleanup as his compute is faster.
